calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor Capital One Bank.
James Vishniakoff, 415-641-1009 Defendant/Judgment Debtor in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court asks questions. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAMES D. VISHNIAKOFF.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, the claim of exemption is granted in part by the Court. $100 is to be withheld from wages per pay period towards the payment of the debt. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)***

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JAMES D. VISHINIAKOO, TEL. NO. 1-415-641-1009, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES D. VISHNIAKOFF'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted and all funds held by the Sheriff are to be returned to him. Mr. Vishniakopff established his entitlement of a claim of exemption and the plaintiff has not shown any reason why that claim should not be granted. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
